termlists._comment: 'xxxxskole'(NO) is specified here to avoid in Norwegian university names, e.g. 'Høyskole'
'city' is prevented truncation due to 'capacity' etc.
terms that need to be combined with city-terms, as they are used in e.g. biomedicine. 'reise' (NO) is moved here because often used in 'reiseliv' (tourism)

terms where truncation is prevented: 'vei' and 'veg', although relevant terms (= way, road) seem to be used nearly always metaphorically ('way to safer workplaces') so suggest removal for practical reasons
'city' is here due to capaCITY etc.

phrases._comment: The NOT-part at the end of WoS string is not included (original termlists 5g and 5j), as probably not needed/useful in title searching

termlists._comment: Other terms/norwegian terms already covered in 5n
acronyms have truncation prevented to avoid results on gdpr
'community' dropped as causes only noise. Added major Norwegian city names, adds no results to phrase 1 but quite a lot to phrase 2
Reused (duplicate) from phrase 1. 'community' dropped as causes only noise. Added major Norwegian city names, adds no results to phrase 1 but quite a lot to phrase 2
Reused (duplicate) from phrase 1. 'community' dropped as causes only noise. Added major Norwegian city names, adds no results to phrase 1 but quite a lot to phrase 2
City names mostly cause noise here so are not included

dropped 'risk'/ 'risiko' (NO) - to drop results about chemical risk assessments/risks in health and animals. Used 'risk judgements'. 'klimatilpas'(NO) in termlist Bc is probably redundant, as it is included in Ba
Possible search for the short titles of the SDGs, to be used in a title search
